title.ar: التعريض بالدعاء لطلب الطعام أو الشراب
title.en: Invocation for someone who gives you drink or offers it to you

items.arabicText: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي، وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي)).

translations.en: (O Allah, feed him who fed me, and provide with drink him who provided me with drink.)
